title: What is the CSS @scope rule?
options: @scope (.card) to (.card-footer) { p { color: red; } } scopes styles to elements between boundaries; prevents style leaking. Provides native CSS scoping without Shadow DOM or naming conventions like BEM
correct_answer: @scope (.card) to (.card-footer) { p { color: red; } } scopes styles to elements between boundaries; prevents style leaking. Provides native CSS scoping without Shadow DOM or naming conventions like BEM

description: Create a hamburger icon that animates to an X.

title: What is the difference between logical and physical CSS properties?
options: Logical properties use inline/block directions instead of physical left/right/top/bottom: margin-inline-start, padding-block-end, border-inline, inline-size (width), block-size (height). Adapt automatically to writing direction (LTR/RTL) and writing mode
correct_answer: Logical properties use inline/block directions instead of physical left/right/top/bottom: margin-inline-start, padding-block-end, border-inline, inline-size (width), block-size (height). Adapt automatically to writing direction (LTR/RTL) and writing mode

title: Build a CSS-only stepper/wizard indicator.
What is the CSS text-wrap: balance property?
options: text-wrap: balance evenly distributes text across lines to avoid short orphan lines; ideal for headings. text-wrap: pretty optimizes line breaks for body text (avoids widows). Both are native alternatives to JS text balancing libraries
correct_answer: text-wrap: balance evenly distributes text across lines to avoid short orphan lines; ideal for headings. text-wrap: pretty optimizes line breaks for body text (avoids widows). Both are native alternatives to JS text balancing libraries

title: Build a CSS gradient border with rounded corners.
What is the CSS starting-style rule?
options: @starting-style defines the initial styles for elements when they first appear (display:none → visible); enables animating from display:none with CSS transitions. Combined with allow-discrete transition behavior for display property
correct_answer: @starting-style defines the initial styles for elements when they first appear (display:none → visible); enables animating from display:none with CSS transitions. Combined with allow-discrete transition behavior for display property

title: What is the CSS field-sizing property?
options: field-sizing: content makes form controls (input, textarea, select) automatically resize to fit their content; textarea grows as user types. Replaces JavaScript auto-resize solutions for form inputs
correct_answer: field-sizing: content makes form controls (input, textarea, select) automatically resize to fit their content; textarea grows as user types. Replaces JavaScript auto-resize solutions for form inputs
